task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Drupal 'Extend' page showing the 'Commerce Tax' module with its checkbox ticked, or a status message confirming it is enabled.
Look for the Store edit page (Commerce > Configuration > Store) with the Timezone dropdown set to 'America/Los_Angeles'.

task_completion.description: Add 'US' to the store's tax registration countries
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Store edit page with 'United States' selected in the 'Tax registrations' multi-select list.

task_completion.description: Update the store's address line to '100 Commerce Boulevard'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Store edit page with '100 Commerce Boulevard' entered in the Street address field.

task_completion.description: Verify the store's default currency is set to USD
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Store edit page with the Default currency dropdown set to 'US Dollar' or 'USD'.

task_completion.description: Create a new customer account for the tax compliance officer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'People' page showing the user 'taxmanager' with email 'tax@urbanelectronics.com' in the user list, or the 'Add user' page being filled out with these details and a subsequent success message.

integrity.description: Agent used the Drupal web GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent uses the web browser to navigate the Drupal admin interface rather than using terminal commands like 'drush' to configure the store or create users.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent does not just write a script or text file with the expected values, but actually interacts with the Drupal application.

integrity.description: Screenshots show genuine browser interaction with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the Drupal admin interface loaded at 'localhost' or '127.0.0.1'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Store ID is 1. Expected timezone is 'America/Los_Angeles'. Expected address line 1 is '100 Commerce Boulevard'. Expected tax country is 'US' (United States). Expected new username is 'taxmanager' with email 'tax@urbanelectronics.com'. Expected currency is 'USD' (US Dollar).
